message:
Merge pull request #1 from llm-d/dependabot/github_actions/actions/checkout-6

deps(actions): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
       has_code_changes: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.code }}
     steps:
       - name: Checkout source
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Check for code changes
         uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ jobs:
     if: needs.check-code-changes.outputs.has_code_changes == 'true'
     steps:
       - name: Checkout source
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Extract Go version from go.mod
         run: sed -En 's/^go (.*)$/GO_VERSION=\1/p' go.mod >> $GITHUB_ENV
@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ jobs:
     if: needs.check-code-changes.outputs.has_code_changes == 'true'
     steps:
       - name: Checkout source
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Check for Python files
         id: check-python
@@ -104,7 +104,7 @@ jobs:
     if: needs.check-code-changes.outputs.has_code_changes == 'true'
     steps:
       - name: Checkout source
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout source
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set project name from repository
         id: meta
